name: Claude Code
description: Installs Claude Code CLI (@anthropic-ai/claude-code) globally via npm. Mounts selected Claude config files from the host machine into the container at creation time.

version.description: Version of @anthropic-ai/claude-code to install (e.g. 'latest', '1.0.17'). Passed directly to 'npm install -g'.

globalConfigHome.description: Path relative to the host home directory whose .claude/ sub-directory and .claude.json are linked into the container's ~/.claude/ and ~/.claude.json. Defaults to the host home directory itself (empty string = home root).

projectConfigFolder.description: Path relative to the host home directory whose .claude/ sub-directory and .claude.json are linked into ${workspaceFolder}/.claude/ and ${workspaceFolder}/.claude.json. Leave empty to skip project-level config.
